straytags.config.title: StrayTags Configuration
straytags.config.debug_commands.tooltip: Enable /straytags test, testuser, verbose, and debug commands
straytags.config.own_format.tooltip: MiniMessage format for own clan members
straytags.config.neutral_format.tooltip: MiniMessage format for neutral players with clans
straytags.config.no_clan_format.tooltip: MiniMessage format for players without a clan
straytags.config.name_pattern.tooltip: Regex pattern to parse nametags. Must have named groups: username, clan (optional)
straytags.config.export_clans.tooltip: Copy this code and send it to another player. They can paste it into the Import field to get your clan lists.
straytags.config.import_clans.tooltip: Paste a clan export code here and click Save to import the clan lists. This will overwrite your current clans.
straytags.config.export_formats.tooltip: Copy this code and send it to another player. They can paste it into the Import field to get your format strings.
straytags.config.import_formats.tooltip: Paste a format export code here and click Save to import the formats. This will overwrite your current formats.
straytags.config.export_full.tooltip: Copy this code and send it to another player. They can paste it into the Import field to get your entire server config.
straytags.config.import_full.tooltip: Paste a full config export code here and click Save to import everything. This will overwrite your current clans AND formats.
